rounds.prompt: How many times older is the Great Pyramid than the Eiffel Tower?
rounds.fact: The Eiffel Tower was built in 1889 (~137 years ago); the Great Pyramid in ~2560 BC (~4,586 years ago) — about 33× older.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer ago did dinosaurs go extinct than humans evolved?
rounds.fact: Modern humans evolved ~300,000 years ago; dinosaurs went extinct ~66 million years ago — 220× further back in time.

rounds.prompt: How many times closer in time to us is Cleopatra than the construction of the Great Pyramid?
rounds.fact: Cleopatra died in 30 BC (~2,055 years ago); the Great Pyramid was built ~2560 BC (2,530 years before her). She was closer in time to us than to the pyramid's construction.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer have sharks existed than dinosaurs?
rounds.fact: Dinosaurs existed for ~165 million years; sharks have existed for ~450 million years — 2.7× longer. Sharks predate trees.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is Earth's history than recorded human history?
rounds.fact: Recorded history goes back ~5,000 years; Earth is ~4.5 billion years old — 900,000× longer. If Earth's age were a day, all of recorded history would be the last 0.5 seconds.
